title: Dreaming of Unseen Pursuer
description: This dream scenario represents the anxiety of fleeing from an unknown fear or threat.

meanings.title: Main Interpretation
meanings.description: According to Freud, such dreams might result from repressed fears or feelings of guilt. Jung suggests that an unconscious issue may be pursuing you, yet to be realized.

meanings.title: Subconscious Warning
meanings.description: Your subconscious might be drawing attention to an issue that needs addressing and could lead to greater problems if ignored.

meanings.title: Life Context
meanings.description: Avoided responsibilities, evasion of confrontations, or anxieties about uncertain situations in daily life may trigger this dream.

interpretation: This dream indicates an ongoing threat or unresolved issue in your life. While its identity remains unknown, it's a clear source of unease.

context.positive: Can be seen as an opportunity for self-awareness.
context.negative: May heighten feelings of anxiety and uncertainty.

keywords: Takip edilmek ama kimin takip ettiğini görememek
